steps.t: Laerind can be found in the village of Ethring. You should speak with Laerind.
Borhador can be found in the village of Ethring. You should speak with Borhador.
Garvir, the leader of the Dor-en-Ernil's Gondorian forces can be found in the city of Linhir. You should seek out Garvir in Linhir.
